$schema-note: Spec entity-name alias table for /spec Step 0.5 topic normalization. Keys are aliases (already passed through the four-rule normalization in .claude/commands/spec.md: trimmed, leading dots/separators stripped, lowercased, internal separator runs collapsed to single hyphens). Each value is the canonical normalized topic the alias resolves to. Lookup is exact-match on the normalized alias string; an unmatched topic passes through unchanged. Origin: Issue #1978, REQ-008 deferred.
